title: sambucus cerulea var. mexicana
intro: Sambucus cerulea var. mexicana, also known as Mexican blue elderberry, is a variety of the Sambucus cerulea plant, a shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mexican blue elderberry include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mexican blue elderberry include tinctures, capsules, and teas, which can be used to promote health and well-being.
